raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request invites evaluation of the paper idea, contribution framing, and whether the claimed framework is conceptually coherent.","R1.2":"Assessing what to think about the artifact centrally involves checking whether the described mechanism, ablations, and conclusions follow logically.","R1.3":"The delegation calls for judging whether reported BLEU, COMET, and ablation results support the stated claims about arbitration and role specialization.","RX.1":"Any projection of an open-ended opinion request must preserve uncertainty about which kind of feedback was intended.","RX.2":"The artifact contains broad claims about closing gaps and generalization, so avoiding unsupported amplification is load-bearing.","RX.3":"The agent must only project responsibility and not actually critique, rewrite, or evaluate the paper content.","RX.4":"Because the artifact makes research-performance claims, the projection should account for avoiding downstream misuse of overconfident assessments.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific claims present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites evaluation of the paper idea, contribution framing, and whether the claimed framework is conceptually coherent.
rationale.R1.2: Assessing what to think about the artifact centrally involves checking whether the described mechanism, ablations, and conclusions follow logically.
rationale.R1.3: The delegation calls for judging whether reported BLEU, COMET, and ablation results support the stated claims about arbitration and role specialization.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of an open-ended opinion request must preserve uncertainty about which kind of feedback was intended.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains broad claims about closing gaps and generalization, so avoiding unsupported amplification is load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must only project responsibility and not actually critique, rewrite, or evaluate the paper content.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact makes research-performance claims, the projection should account for avoiding downstream misuse of overconfident assessments.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific claims present in the artifact.
